_meta.note: step_intervals_days[i] = days to wait after the PREVIOUS step was sent before firing step i+1. Index 0 = days after started_at before firing step 1.

steps.label: Connection request
steps.template: Hi {{first_name}}, I help HR teams at Omani SMEs cut WPS/Sanad admin from hours to minutes. Building SmartPro Hub — Oman's first AI-native HR & payroll platform. Would love to connect. – Fahad

steps.label: Curiosity opener
steps.template:
Hi {{first_name}}, thanks for connecting!

Quick question — how much time does your team spend on WPS submissions and MOL/Sanad compliance each month?

We've found most Oman HR managers lose 2+ days a month to it. I'd love to hear what it looks like at {{company}} — happy to share what we built to fix it.

steps.label: Pilot results / proof
steps.template:
{{first_name}}, we wrapped a 30-day pilot with an Oman engineering SME (50 staff):

• WPS prep: 2 days → 90 mins
• Sanad renewals: manual tracking → automated alerts
• MOL submissions: zero missed deadlines

No IT setup needed. Uploads direct from your existing payroll file.

Would a quick walkthrough be useful for {{company}}?

steps.label: Free pilot CTA
steps.template:
{{first_name}}, we're onboarding 5 Oman SMEs for a free 3-month SmartPro Hub pilot — priority given to in-house HR teams managing WPS + Sanad.

OMR 0 to trial. Full platform access.

Worth a 15-min call to see if {{company}} is a good fit? Grab a slot: www.thesmartpro.io/demo

Or just reply here — happy to answer any questions first.

steps.label: Final follow-up
steps.template:
{{first_name}}, last message from me — the pilot cohort closes this week.

If the timing's off, totally fine. But if HR/payroll compliance is still a manual headache at {{company}}, I'd hate for you to miss it.

One question: what's your biggest HR admin pain right now? Even if we're not a fit, I might know someone who can help.
